title: Fix wait(0) causing caller to still continue

features.name: wait(0) statement inside task
features.description: Code should include a wait statement with constant 0 condition placed inside a task body

features.name: nested task calls with wait in inner task
features.description: Code should include an outer task that calls an inner task, where the inner task contains a wait(0) statement that should block the outer task's execution
features.snippet:
task outer_task(); inner_task(); endtask
task inner_task(); wait (0); endtask

features.name: fork-join with task containing wait(0)
features.description: Code should include a fork-join block that spawns a thread calling a task which contains wait(0), where #0 delays are used before and after the task call
